---
title: "Pygo_gene_enrichment v2.1 (AUTO-WRAP, robust – KEGGREST)"
author: "Galen O'Shea-Stone"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Transcriptomics → GO/KEGG/Reactome enrichment (Gallus) + diagnostics + export
# Robust joins, parallelism, Reactome fallback, KEGG caching, SVGs, and guards.
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

##############################################################################
## 0. CONFIGURATION                                                          ##
##############################################################################
input_file         <- "DESeq2_experimental_vs_controlF_refactored_results_8_20_25.csv"  # gene, logFC, padj
species_name       <- "chicken"      # will fallback to "Gallus gallus" if needed
kegg_code          <- "gga"          # KEGG organism code
padj_cutoff        <- 0.05
logFC_cutoff       <- 2
topN_per_direction <- 2000           # cap up & down separately
use_table_universe <- TRUE           # FALSE → all-gene background (orgDb)
minGSSize          <- 10             # filter small sets (ORA/GSEA)
maxGSSize          <- 500            # filter huge sets (ORA/GSEA)
install_missing    <- FALSE          # set TRUE if you want auto-install

set.seed(1234)

##############################################################################
## 1. PACKAGES                                                               ##
##############################################################################
if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("BiocManager")

cran_pkgs <- c("UpSetR","EnhancedVolcano","stringr","glue","openxlsx",
               "ggplot2","dplyr","tidyr","networkD3","htmlwidgets","grid")

bio_pkgs  <- c("clusterProfiler","ReactomePA","pathview","AnnotationDbi",
               "ComplexHeatmap","circlize","KEGGREST","org.Gg.eg.db",
               "BiocParallel","enrichplot")

maybe_install <- function(pkgs, bioc=FALSE){
  for (p in pkgs) {
    if (!requireNamespace(p, quietly = TRUE) && isTRUE(install_missing)) {
      if (bioc) BiocManager::install(p, ask = FALSE, update = FALSE)
      else      install.packages(p, dependencies = TRUE)
    }
  }
}
maybe_install(cran_pkgs, bioc = FALSE)
maybe_install(bio_pkgs,  bioc = TRUE)

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(clusterProfiler); library(ReactomePA);  library(pathview)
  library(AnnotationDbi);   library(dplyr);       library(ggplot2)
  library(openxlsx);        library(ComplexHeatmap); library(circlize)
  library(UpSetR);          library(EnhancedVolcano); library(enrichplot)
  library(stringr);         library(glue);         library(KEGGREST)
  library(org.Gg.eg.db);    library(tidyr);        library(BiocParallel)
  library(grid);            library(networkD3);     library(htmlwidgets)
})

orgDb <- org.Gg.eg.db

# Parallel workers  (Windows: SnowParam; others: MulticoreParam)
if (.Platform$OS.type == "windows") {
  param <- SnowParam(workers = max(1, parallel::detectCores() - 1))
} else {
  param <- MulticoreParam(workers = max(1, parallel::detectCores() - 1))
}
register(param)

# Global plotting theme
theme_set(theme_bw(base_size = 11))

# Output dir
outdir <- "output"
dir.create(outdir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# Helpers
save_plot <- function(p, fname, w = 7, h = 5){
  fpdf <- file.path(outdir, fname)
  ggsave(fpdf, plot = p, width = w, height = h, units = "in", dpi = 300)
  # also SVG for slides/pubs (avoid regex pitfalls)
  if (endsWith(fname, ".pdf")) {
    fsvg <- file.path(outdir, sub("\\.pdf$", ".svg", fname))
    ggsave(fsvg, plot = p, width = w, height = h, units = "in", dpi = 300)
  }
}

as_df <- function(res, id_col = "geneID"){
  if (is.null(res) || nrow(as.data.frame(res)) == 0) return(data.frame())
  dplyr::rename(as.data.frame(res), Genes = !!id_col)
}

##############################################################################
## 2. READ & PREP DATA (robust column detection)                             ##
##############################################################################
tbl_raw <- read.csv(input_file, check.names = FALSE)

if (ncol(tbl_raw) < 3)
  stop("Expected at least 3 columns (gene, logFC, padj). Got: ", ncol(tbl_raw))

# Flexible column detection: match common aliases; fallback to positions 1/2/3.
# Also handle duplicate header names by temporarily uniquifying for extraction.
orig_names <- names(tbl_raw)
names(tbl_raw) <- make.unique(orig_names)

normalize_names <- function(x) tolower(gsub("[^a-z0-9]+", "", x))
nm <- normalize_names(names(tbl_raw))

find_col <- function(cands, default_idx) {
  idx <- which(nm %in% normalize_names(cands))
  if (length(idx) == 0) default_idx else idx[1]
}

gene_cands  <- c("gene","genes","symbol","gene_symbol","hgnc","mgi","ensembl","ensemblid","ensembl_id")
logfc_cands <- c("logfc","log2fc","log2foldchange","log2_fold_change","lfc","log2fc.wald","stat")  # stat as last resort
padj_cands  <- c("padj","p_adj","p.adjust","p_adjust","adj.p.val","adj_p_val","fdr","qvalue","q_value")

gcol <- find_col(gene_cands, 1)
lcol <- find_col(logfc_cands, 2)
pcol <- find_col(padj_cands,  3)

# Build a clean 3-column table with numeric coercion
suppressWarnings({
  tbl <- tibble::tibble(
    gene = as.character(tbl_raw[[gcol]]),
    logFC = as.numeric(tbl_raw[[lcol]]),
    padj  = as.numeric(tbl_raw[[pcol]])
  )
})

# Guard rails: ensure numeric columns parsed
if (all(is.na(tbl$logFC)))
  stop("Could not parse logFC column as numeric (chosen source column index ", lcol,
       "). Check your input header or numeric format.")
if (all(is.na(tbl$padj)))
  stop("Could not parse padj/FDR/qvalue column as numeric (chosen source column index ", pcol,
       "). Check your input header or numeric format.")

# strip Ensembl version suffix (e.g., ENSG... .1)
tbl$gene <- sub("\\.\\d+$", "", tbl$gene)

# ID type detection
is_ensembl <- all(grepl("^ENS", tbl$gene, ignore.case = FALSE))
keytype    <- if (is_ensembl) "ENSEMBL" else "SYMBOL"
message("Detected keytype → ", keytype)

# Map to ENTREZ + SYMBOL/ENSEMBL for plotting
map_cols <- if (keytype == "ENSEMBL") c("ENTREZID","SYMBOL") else c("ENTREZID","ENSEMBL")
gene_map <- AnnotationDbi::select(orgDb, keys = tbl$gene, columns = map_cols, keytype = keytype)

# Join: tbl$gene (left) to gene_map[[keytype]] (right)
tbl <- left_join(tbl, gene_map, by = setNames(keytype, "gene")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(ENTREZID))

# gene_label for plotting
if (!"SYMBOL" %in% names(tbl)) tbl$SYMBOL <- NA_character_
tbl <- tbl %>% mutate(gene_label = coalesce(SYMBOL, gene))

# Background universe
if (use_table_universe) {
  gene_universe <- unique(as.character(tbl$ENTREZID))
} else {
  gene_universe <- keys(orgDb, keytype = "ENTREZID")
}

# Significant set selection (cap per direction)
tbl_sig_base <- tbl %>% filter(padj < padj_cutoff, abs(logFC) >= logFC_cutoff)
up_sig   <- tbl_sig_base %>% filter(logFC > 0) %>% arrange(desc(logFC)) %>% slice_head(n = topN_per_direction)
down_sig <- tbl_sig_base %>% filter(logFC < 0) %>% arrange(logFC)       %>% slice_head(n = topN_per_direction)
tbl_sig  <- bind_rows(up_sig, down_sig)
sig_genes <- unique(as.character(tbl_sig$ENTREZID))

# Summary
num_input    <- nrow(tbl_raw)
num_mapped   <- nrow(tbl)
num_unmapped <- num_input - num_mapped
num_universe <- length(gene_universe)
num_sig      <- length(sig_genes)
pct_sig      <- if (num_universe > 0) 100 * num_sig / num_universe else NA_real_

cat(sprintf(
  "\n====== SUMMARY ======\nInput genes: %d\nMapped genes: %d\nUnmapped: %d\nUniverse: %d\nTest set: %d (%.1f%%)\n",
  num_input, num_mapped, num_unmapped, num_universe, num_sig, pct_sig))

summary_stats <- data.frame(
  Step       = c("Input genes","Mapped genes","Unmapped genes","Universe","Test set"),
  Gene_Count = c(num_input, num_mapped, num_unmapped, num_universe, num_sig),
  Percent    = c(NA,
                 if (num_input>0) 100*num_mapped/num_input else NA,
                 if (num_input>0) 100*num_unmapped/num_input else NA,
                 NA,
                 pct_sig)
)
write.xlsx(summary_stats, file = file.path(outdir,"summary_stats.xlsx"), overwrite = TRUE)

# quick pies/bars (guard for zero-sized universe)
if (num_universe > 0) {
  pdf(file.path(outdir,"testset_vs_universe_pie.pdf"), 5, 5)
  pie(c(num_sig, max(0, num_universe-num_sig)),
      labels = c(sprintf("Test set\n(%d)", num_sig), sprintf("Universe\n(%d)", max(0, num_universe-num_sig))),
      col = c("deepskyblue","grey90"), main = "Genes in Test Set vs. Universe")
  dev.off()
}

bar_vals <- c(Input=num_input, Mapped=num_mapped, Universe=num_universe, TestSet=num_sig)
pdf(file.path(outdir, "gene_counts_barplot.pdf"), 5, 4)
barplot(bar_vals, main="Gene Counts at Key Steps", ylab="Number of genes",
        col="darkseagreen", ylim=c(0, max(bar_vals, na.rm = TRUE)*1.1))
dev.off()

# Up vs down table (significant)
up_down_counts <- tbl %>%
  mutate(Regulation = case_when(
    logFC >=  logFC_cutoff & padj < padj_cutoff ~ "Up",
    logFC <= -logFC_cutoff & padj < padj_cutoff ~ "Down",
    TRUE ~ "NoChange")) %>%
  filter(Regulation %in% c("Up","Down")) %>%
  count(Regulation, name="Gene_Count") %>%
  mutate(Percent = round(100 * Gene_Count / sum(Gene_Count), 1))

openxlsx::write.xlsx(list(
  UpDown_Counts = up_down_counts,
  Up_Genes      = up_sig,
  Down_Genes    = down_sig
), file = file.path(outdir,"up_vs_down_summary.xlsx"), overwrite = TRUE)


##############################################################################
## 3. RANKS FOR GSEA                                                         ##
##############################################################################
rank_col <- if ("stat" %in% names(tbl)) "stat" else "logFC"
tbl_nodup <- tbl %>% group_by(ENTREZID) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = abs(.data[[rank_col]]), n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup()
ranks <- tbl_nodup %>% arrange(desc(.data[[rank_col]])) %>%
  transmute(ENTREZID, rnk = .data[[rank_col]]) %>% tibble::deframe()

##############################################################################
## 4. ENRICHMENT (GO/KEGG/Reactome)                                          ##
##############################################################################

# Normalize your species_name label (used elsewhere), but Reactome will use "chicken"
valid_species <- c("Gallus gallus", "chicken", "gallus gallus")
if (!tolower(species_name) %in% tolower(valid_species)) {
  warning(glue::glue("Unknown species_name '{species_name}'. Using 'Gallus gallus' for labels."))
  species_name <- "Gallus gallus"
} else if (tolower(species_name) != "gallus gallus") {
  species_name <- "Gallus gallus"
}

# GO BP/MF ORA (then simplify to reduce redundancy)
ego <- enrichGO(
  gene          = sig_genes,
  OrgDb         = orgDb,
  keyType       = "ENTREZID",
  ont           = "BP",
  universe      = gene_universe,
  pAdjustMethod = "BH",
  readable      = TRUE,
  minGSSize     = minGSSize,
  maxGSSize     = maxGSSize
)
ego_MF <- enrichGO(
  gene          = sig_genes,
  OrgDb         = orgDb,
  keyType       = "ENTREZID",
  ont           = "MF",
  universe      = gene_universe,
  pAdjustMethod = "BH",
  readable      = TRUE,
  minGSSize     = minGSSize,
  maxGSSize     = maxGSSize
)

# Reduce GO redundancy when possible (safe if simplify unavailable)
ego    <- tryCatch(simplify(ego,    cutoff = 0.7, by = "p.adjust", select_fun = min), error=function(e) ego)
ego_MF <- tryCatch(simplify(ego_MF, cutoff = 0.7, by = "p.adjust", select_fun = min), error=function(e) ego_MF)

# KEGG ORA via KEGGREST + enricher (with caching & safety)
cache_maps <- file.path(outdir, "kegg_maps.rds")
if (file.exists(cache_maps)) {
  kmaps <- readRDS(cache_maps)
  kmap  <- kmaps$kmap; kdesc <- kmaps$kdesc
} else {
  safe_keggLink <- function(to, org) tryCatch(KEGGREST::keggLink(to, org), error=function(e) NULL)
  safe_keggList <- function(db, org) tryCatch(KEGGREST::keggList(db, org), error=function(e) NULL)
  kmap  <- safe_keggLink("pathway", kegg_code)
  kdesc <- safe_keggList("pathway", kegg_code)
  if (is.null(kmap) || is.null(kdesc)) stop("KEGGREST failed; try again or check connection.")
  saveRDS(list(kmap = kmap, kdesc = kdesc), cache_maps)
  writeLines(paste("KEGG mappings fetched:", Sys.Date()), file.path(outdir,"KEGG_fetch_date.txt"))
}

kegg_term2gene <- data.frame(
  term = sub("path:",  "", unname(kmap)),
  gene = sub(paste0(kegg_code, ":"), "", names(kmap)),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
kegg_term2name <- data.frame(
  term = sub("path:", "", names(kdesc)),
  name = sub(" - .*", "", unname(kdesc)),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

ekegg <- enricher(
  gene          = sig_genes,
  universe      = gene_universe,
  TERM2GENE     = kegg_term2gene,
  TERM2NAME     = kegg_term2name,
  pAdjustMethod = "BH",
  minGSSize     = minGSSize,
  maxGSSize     = maxGSSize
)
if (nrow(as.data.frame(ekegg)) > 0)
  ekegg <- setReadable(ekegg, orgDb, keyType = "ENTREZID")
ekegg_df <- as.data.frame(ekegg); if (nrow(ekegg_df) == 0) ekegg_df <- tibble::tibble()

# Reactome ORA — use common name "chicken"; make readable afterward to avoid pkg-length error
reactome_org <- "chicken"
ereact <- tryCatch(
  enrichPathway(
    gene          = sig_genes,
    universe      = gene_universe,
    organism      = reactome_org,
    pAdjustMethod = "BH",
    readable      = FALSE,          # defer to setReadable() to avoid internal OrgDb lookup issues
    minGSSize     = minGSSize,
    maxGSSize     = maxGSSize
  ),
  error = function(e) {
    message("ReactomePA::enrichPathway failed for '", reactome_org, "': ", e$message)
    return(new("enrichResult"))     # empty object fallback to keep downstream code safe
  }
)
if (inherits(ereact, "enrichResult") && nrow(as.data.frame(ereact)) > 0) {
  ereact <- setReadable(ereact, orgDb, keyType = "ENTREZID")
}

# GSEA (BP, MF, KEGG)
gsea_go <- gseGO(
  geneList      = ranks,
  OrgDb         = orgDb,
  ont           = "BP",
  pAdjustMethod = "BH",
  minGSSize     = minGSSize,
  maxGSSize     = maxGSSize
)
gsea_go_readable <- setReadable(gsea_go, orgDb, keyType = "ENTREZID")

gsea_go_MF <- gseGO(
  geneList      = ranks,
  OrgDb         = orgDb,
  ont           = "MF",
  pAdjustMethod = "BH",
  minGSSize     = minGSSize,
  maxGSSize     = maxGSSize
)

gsea_kegg <- gseKEGG(
  geneList      = ranks,
  organism      = kegg_code,
  pAdjustMethod = "BH",
  minGSSize     = minGSSize,
  maxGSSize     = maxGSSize,
  verbose       = FALSE
)

# Optional convenience export
write.xlsx(as.data.frame(gsea_kegg),
           file = file.path(outdir,"KEGG_GSEA_results.xlsx"),
           overwrite = TRUE)


##############################################################################
## 5. CONSOLIDATED EXPORTS                                                   ##
##############################################################################
wb <- createWorkbook()
add_data <- function(wb, sheet, df){
  addWorksheet(wb, sheet)
  if (is.null(df) || nrow(as.data.frame(df)) == 0) {
    writeData(wb, sheet, data.frame(Note = "No results"))
  } else {
    writeData(wb, sheet, df)
  }
}

add_data(wb, "GO_BP_ORA",    as_df(ego))
add_data(wb, "GO_MF_ORA",    as_df(ego_MF))
add_data(wb, "KEGG_ORA",     as_df(ekegg))
add_data(wb, "Reactome_ORA", as_df(ereact))
add_data(wb, "GO_BP_GSEA",   as_df(gsea_go,    "core_enrichment"))
add_data(wb, "GO_MF_GSEA",   as_df(gsea_go_MF, "core_enrichment"))
add_data(wb, "Summary",      summary_stats)
saveWorkbook(wb, file.path(outdir, "enrichment_results_with_genes_and_summary.xlsx"), overwrite = TRUE)

##############################################################################
## 6. PLOTS (Volcano + distributions)                                        ##
##############################################################################

# Override saver here to avoid svglite errors (PDF always; SVG only if available)
save_plot <- local({
  can_svg <- suppressWarnings(requireNamespace("svglite", quietly = TRUE))
  function(p, fname, w = 7, h = 5){
    fpdf <- file.path(outdir, fname)
    ggsave(fpdf, plot = p, width = w, height = h, units = "in", dpi = 300)
    if (endsWith(fname, ".pdf") && isTRUE(can_svg)) {
      fsvg <- file.path(outdir, sub("\\.pdf$", ".svg", fname))
      ggsave(fsvg, plot = p, width = w, height = h, units = "in", dpi = 300)
    }
  }
})

# Volcano (gene_label when available)
volc <- EnhancedVolcano(
  tbl, lab = tbl$gene_label,
  x = "logFC", y = "padj",
  xlab = bquote(~Log[2]~" fold change"),
  pCutoff = padj_cutoff, FCcutoff = logFC_cutoff
)
save_plot(volc, "volcano_plot.pdf", 7, 6)

# Focused volcano (top N by padj then |logFC|)
topNGenes <- 40
tbl_top <- tbl %>%
  dplyr::filter(padj < padj_cutoff) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(padj, dplyr::desc(abs(logFC))) %>%
  dplyr::slice_head(n = topNGenes)

volc_focus <- EnhancedVolcano(
  tbl,
  lab        = tbl$gene_label,
  x          = "logFC",
  y          = "padj",
  pCutoff    = padj_cutoff,
  FCcutoff   = logFC_cutoff,
  selectLab  = tbl_top$gene_label,
  labSize    = 5,
  colAlpha   = .6,
  title      = glue::glue("Focused volcano ({topNGenes} top genes highlighted)"),
  subtitle   = "Ordered by adjusted P-value then |log2FC|",
  caption    = ""
)
save_plot(volc_focus, "volcano_top_genes_large.pdf", 9, 8)

# |log2FC| distribution
pdf(file.path(outdir,"logFC_bins_barplot.pdf"), 6, 4)
barplot(
  table(cut(abs(tbl$logFC),
            c(0, 1, 2, 4, 8, Inf),
            labels = c("<1", "1-2", "2-4", "4-8", ">8"))),
  main = "Distribution of |log2FC|",
  ylab = "Gene count",
  xlab = "|log2FC| bin"
)
dev.off()


##############################################################################
## 7. UpSet (all sets + neural subset)                                       ##
##############################################################################
neural_kw <- unique(c(
  "neuro","neuron","neura","neural","synap","axon","dendrit","neur","brain","nerv",
  "glia","myelin","schwann","spine","plasticity","cerebral","cerebell","cortex",
  "spinal","ganglia","astrocyte","oligodendro","hippocamp","amygdala","neurite",
  "neuritogen","growth cone","axon elongat","axon outgrowth","axon extension",
  "dendrite outgrowth","dendrite extension","neuron projection","neuronal projection",
  "growth-cone cytoskeleton","filopodia","lamellipod","microtubule polymeriz",
  "actin cytoskelet","neurotransm","neuropept","neuromodul","autonom",
  "sympathetic","parasympathetic","neuromuscular","neurogenesis","axonogen",
  "myelination","microglia"))
neural_class_kw <- c("Nervous system","Neurodegenerative","Sensory system")
neural_pattern <- paste(c(neural_kw, neural_class_kw), collapse = "|")

get_desc <- function(obj){
  if (is.null(obj)) return(character(0))
  df <- as.data.frame(obj)
  if (!"Description" %in% names(df)) return(character(0))
  na.omit(unique(df$Description))
}

terms_all <- list(
  GO_BP_ORA    = get_desc(ego),
  KEGG_ORA     = get_desc(ekegg),
  Reactome_ORA = get_desc(ereact),
  GO_BP_GSEA   = get_desc(gsea_go),
  GO_MF_GSEA   = get_desc(gsea_go_MF)
)
pretty_names <- c(GO_BP_ORA="GO-BP ORA", KEGG_ORA="KEGG ORA", Reactome_ORA="Reactome ORA",
                  GO_BP_GSEA="GO-BP GSEA", GO_MF_GSEA="GO-MF GSEA")
terms_all <- terms_all[lengths(terms_all) > 0]
names(terms_all) <- pretty_names[names(terms_all)]

make_upset <- function(term_list, tag){
  comb_mat <- ComplexHeatmap::make_comb_mat(term_list)
  comb_mat <- comb_mat[order(ComplexHeatmap::comb_size(comb_mat), decreasing = TRUE)]
  left_anno <- ComplexHeatmap::rowAnnotation(
    "Set size" = ComplexHeatmap::anno_barplot(ComplexHeatmap::set_size(comb_mat),
                                              gp = grid::gpar(fill="grey40"), border=FALSE,
                                              bar_width=0.9, axis_param=list(side="bottom")))
  top_anno  <- ComplexHeatmap::upset_top_annotation(comb_mat, add_numbers = TRUE,
                                                    gp = grid::gpar(fill="steelblue"))

  for (ext in c("pdf","png")){
    outf <- file.path(outdir, glue("upset_{tag}.{ext}"))
    if (ext=="pdf") pdf(outf, 7, 5) else png(outf, 1400, 1000, res=200)
    ht <- ComplexHeatmap::UpSet(comb_mat, left_annotation=left_anno, top_annotation=top_anno,
                                show_row_names=TRUE,
                                row_names_gp=grid::gpar(fontsize=10,fontface="bold"),
                                set_order=rev(names(term_list)))
    ComplexHeatmap::draw(ht); dev.off()
  }
  # UpSetR backup
  mat <- UpSetR::fromList(term_list)
  pdf(file.path(outdir, glue("upset_{tag}_UpSetR.pdf")), 8, 6)
  UpSetR::upset(mat, sets=colnames(mat), nsets=ncol(mat), nintersects=NA,
                order.by="freq", keep.order=TRUE, main.bar.color="darkred",
                sets.bar.color="steelblue")
  try({
    bars_y <- grid::convertY(grid::unit(UpSetR::upset_plot_env$Main_bar_y, "native"), "npc", valueOnly=TRUE)
    bars_x <- grid::convertX(grid::unit(UpSetR::upset_plot_env$Main_bar_x, "native"), "npc", valueOnly=TRUE)
    counts <- UpSetR::upset_plot_env$Main_bar_data$freq
    grid::grid.text(counts, x=bars_x, y=bars_y+0.02, gp=grid::gpar(cex=0.7))
  }, silent = TRUE)
  dev.off()
}

if (length(terms_all) >= 2) make_upset(terms_all, "full") else message("Insufficient sets for UpSet full.")

terms_neural <- lapply(terms_all, function(v) v[grepl(neural_pattern, v, ignore.case = TRUE)])
terms_neural <- terms_neural[lengths(terms_neural) > 0]
if (length(terms_neural) >= 2) make_upset(terms_neural, "neural") else message("Insufficient neural sets for UpSet.")

##############################################################################
## 8. Dot-plots / cnet / emap / GSEA visuals                                 ##
##############################################################################
make_dot <- function(res, stub, title, n_cat=15, wrap_width=45,
                     text_size=9, text_angle=0, w=7, h=5){
  df <- as.data.frame(res); if (nrow(df)==0) return(invisible())
  df <- df[seq_len(min(n_cat, nrow(df))), ]
  df$Description <- stringr::str_wrap(df$Description, width = wrap_width)

  if (all(c("GeneRatio","Count") %in% names(df))) {
    df$GeneRatioNum <- vapply(strsplit(df$GeneRatio, "/"),
                              function(x) as.numeric(x[1])/as.numeric(x[2]), numeric(1))
    x_var <- "GeneRatioNum"; x_lab <- "Gene ratio"; size_var <- "Count"
  } else if (all(c("NES","setSize") %in% names(df))) {
    x_var <- "NES"; x_lab <- "NES"; size_var <- "setSize"
  } else return(invisible())

  p <- ggplot(df, aes_string(x=x_var, y=paste0("reorder(Description,",x_var,")"),
                             size=size_var, colour="p.adjust")) +
    geom_point() +
    scale_colour_continuous(trans="reverse", name="adj-P") +
    scale_size(range=c(2,6)) +
    labs(title=title, x=x_lab, y=NULL) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size=text_size, angle=text_angle,
                                     hjust=ifelse(text_angle==0,1,0.5)))
  save_plot(p, sprintf("dotplot_%s.pdf", stub), w, h)
}

if (nrow(as.data.frame(ego))>0) save_plot(cnetplot(ego, showCategory=10, node_label="all"),
                                          "cnetplot_GO_ORA.pdf", 9, 8)
make_dot(ego,       "GO_ORA",      "GO BP ORA")
make_dot(ego_MF,    "GO_MF_ORA",   "GO MF ORA")
make_dot(ekegg,     "KEGG_ORA",    "KEGG ORA")
make_dot(ereact,    "Reactome_ORA","Reactome ORA")
make_dot(gsea_go,   "GO_GSEA",     "GO BP GSEA (preranked)")
make_dot(gsea_go_MF,"GO_MF_GSEA",  "GO MF GSEA (preranked)")

# cnetplots with foldChange
fc_vec <- setNames(tbl$logFC, tbl$ENTREZID)
enrich_list <- list(GO_ORA=ego, KEGG_ORA=ekegg, Reactome_ORA=ereact, GO_GSEA=gsea_go)
for (stub in names(enrich_list)){
  res <- enrich_list[[stub]]; df <- as.data.frame(res)
  if (nrow(df)==0) next
  nCat <- min(10, nrow(df))
  p <- cnetplot(res, showCategory=nCat, foldChange=fc_vec, node_label="all") +
       ggtitle(glue("{stub}: cnetplot (top {nCat} terms)"))
  save_plot(p, sprintf("cnetplot_%s.pdf", stub), 9, 8)
}

# emapplot (after simplify for GO BP)
if (nrow(as.data.frame(ego))>0) {
  ego_sim <- pairwise_termsim(ego)
  save_plot(enrichplot::emapplot(ego_sim, showCategory=30), "emapplot_GO_ORA.pdf", 9, 7)
}

# GSEA running score (top 3)
if (nrow(as.data.frame(gsea_go))>0) {
  pdf(file.path(outdir,"gsea_running_score.pdf"), 9, 6)
  for (id in head(gsea_go@result$ID, 3)) print(enrichplot::gseaplot2(gsea_go, geneSetID=id))
  dev.off()
}

##############################################################################
## 9. Leading-edge exports & bars                                            ##
##############################################################################
if (nrow(as.data.frame(gsea_go))>0){
  top_gsea <- head(gsea_go@result, 3)
  leading_edge_long <- top_gsea %>%
    dplyr::select(ID, Description, core_enrichment, NES, p.adjust) %>%
    tidyr::separate_rows(core_enrichment, sep = "/") %>%
    dplyr::rename(ENTREZID = core_enrichment) %>%
    left_join(tbl[, c("ENTREZID","gene_label","logFC")], by = "ENTREZID")

  write.xlsx(leading_edge_long, file = file.path(outdir,"gsea_leading_edge_genes.xlsx"), overwrite = TRUE)

  for (term in unique(leading_edge_long$ID)) {
    le_term <- leading_edge_long %>% filter(ID==term, !is.na(logFC))
    if (nrow(le_term)>0) {
      topN_le <- le_term %>% arrange(desc(abs(logFC))) %>% head(25)
      p <- ggplot(topN_le, aes(x=reorder(gene_label, logFC), y=logFC, fill=logFC)) +
        geom_col() + coord_flip() +
        labs(title = glue("Leading-edge genes: {unique(topN_le$Description)}"),
             x = "Gene symbol", y = "log2 fold change") +
        theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
        scale_fill_gradient2(low="royalblue", mid="white", high="firebrick")
      save_plot(p, sprintf("gsea_leading_edge_%s.pdf", term), 8, 5)
    }
  }
}

##############################################################################
## 10. KEGG CLASS annotate + Pathview diagrams + Sankey                      ##
##############################################################################
# Add KEGG CLASS to ekegg_df and sync object
if (nrow(ekegg_df)) {
  message("Annotating KEGG pathways with CLASS …")
  kinfo <- tryCatch(KEGGREST::keggGet(ekegg_df$ID), error=function(e) NULL)
  if (!is.null(kinfo)) {
    class_df <- data.frame(
      ID    = vapply(kinfo, function(x) sub("path:","", x$ENTRY),  ""),
      Class = vapply(kinfo, function(x) paste(x$CLASS, collapse="; "), ""),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    ekegg_df <- dplyr::left_join(ekegg_df, class_df, by="ID")
    ekegg@result <- ekegg_df
  }
}

# Pathview for top KEGG ORA
fc_vec <- setNames(tbl$logFC, tbl$ENTREZID)
kegg_outdir <- file.path(outdir, "pathview"); dir.create(kegg_outdir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

if (nrow(ekegg_df) > 0) {
  top_kegg <- head(ekegg_df$ID, 10)
  top_desc <- head(ekegg_df$Description, 10)
  guide_list <- list()
  for (i in seq_along(top_kegg)) {
    pid  <- top_kegg[i]; desc <- top_desc[i]; clean_id <- sub("^gga","",pid)
    message("Rendering KEGG diagram for ", pid)
    old_wd <- getwd(); setwd(kegg_outdir)
    tryCatch({
      pv_out <- pathview(gene.data = fc_vec, pathway.id = clean_id, species = kegg_code, out.suffix = "logFC")
      basefile <- paste0(pid, ".logFC")
      guide_list[[length(guide_list)+1]] <- data.frame(
        Pathway_ID  = pid, Description = desc,
        PNG_File    = file.path("pathview", paste0(basefile,".png")),
        PDF_File    = file.path("pathview", paste0(basefile,".pdf")),
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
    }, error=function(e){ message("Pathview error for ", pid, ": ", e$message) })
    setwd(old_wd)
  }
  if (length(guide_list)>0){
    kegg_guide <- do.call(rbind, guide_list)
    write.csv(kegg_guide, file = file.path(outdir,"kegg_pathview_guide.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
    write.xlsx(kegg_guide, file = file.path(outdir,"kegg_pathview_guide.xlsx"), overwrite = TRUE)
  }
}

# Sankey: Genes → KEGG Pathways → Class
if (nrow(ekegg_df) > 0) {
  N_PATH <- 10
  kegg_top <- ekegg_df %>% slice_head(n = N_PATH)
  gene_lookup <- tbl %>% dplyr::select(ENTREZID, gene_label)

  links_g2p <- kegg_top %>%
    dplyr::select(Description, geneID) %>%
    tidyr::separate_rows(geneID, sep = "/") %>%
    dplyr::left_join(gene_lookup, by = c("geneID" = "ENTREZID")) %>%
    dplyr::transmute(source = gene_label, target = Description, value = 1L) %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(source))

  if (!"Class" %in% names(kegg_top)) kegg_top$Class <- "Unknown class"

  links_p2c <- kegg_top %>%
    dplyr::transmute(source = Description, target = Class, value = Count)

  links_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(links_g2p, links_p2c)
  nodes <- data.frame(name = unique(c(links_all$source, links_all$target)))
  links_all$source <- match(links_all$source, nodes$name) - 1L
  links_all$target <- match(links_all$target, nodes$name) - 1L

  sankey <- sankeyNetwork(Links=links_all, Nodes=nodes, Source="source", Target="target",
                          Value="value", NodeID="name", fontSize=12, nodeWidth=22, sinksRight=FALSE)
  out_file <- file.path(outdir,"sankey_genes_kegg.html")
  htmlwidgets::saveWidget(sankey, file = out_file, selfcontained = TRUE)
  message("✓ Sankey diagram written: ", out_file)
}

##############################################################################
## 11. Neural-focused subset (BP + MF)                                       ##
##############################################################################
pick_neural_terms <- function(df){
  if (is.null(df) || nrow(df)==0 || !("Description" %in% names(df))) return(df)
  df[grepl(neural_pattern, df$Description, ignore.case = TRUE), , drop = FALSE]
}

neural_ora     <- pick_neural_terms(as.data.frame(ego))
neural_gsea    <- pick_neural_terms(as.data.frame(gsea_go))
neural_ora_MF  <- pick_neural_terms(as.data.frame(ego_MF))
neural_gsea_MF <- pick_neural_terms(as.data.frame(gsea_go_MF))

if (nrow(neural_ora)  > 0) make_dot(neural_ora,  "GO_ORA_NEURAL",  "Neural GO-BP ORA (subset)")
if (nrow(neural_gsea) > 0) make_dot(neural_gsea, "GO_GSEA_NEURAL", "Neural GO-BP GSEA (subset)")

# ridgeplot for neural GSEA BP (if ≥3)
if (nrow(neural_gsea) >= 3 && "ID" %in% names(neural_gsea)) {
  neural_rows <- which(gsea_go@result$ID %in% na.omit(neural_gsea$ID))
  if (length(neural_rows) >= 3) {
    N_gsea <- min(length(neural_rows), 15)
    gsea_go_neural <- gsea_go; gsea_go_neural@result <- gsea_go@result[neural_rows, , drop = FALSE]
    pdf(file.path(outdir,"ridgeplot_GO_GSEA_NEURAL.pdf"), 7, 0.5 * N_gsea + 2)
    print(enrichplot::ridgeplot(gsea_go_neural, showCategory = N_gsea) +
            labs(x="Enrichment score (NES)", y=NULL) +
            theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size=10)))
    dev.off()
  }
}

# cnet for neural ORA (needs ≥2)
if (nrow(neural_ora) > 1) {
  neural_ids <- unique(na.omit(neural_ora$ID))
  neural_ego <- ego; neural_ego@result <- dplyr::filter(ego@result, ID %in% neural_ids)
  p <- cnetplot(neural_ego, showCategory = min(15, length(neural_ids)), foldChange = fc_vec, node_label = "all")
  save_plot(p, "cnetplot_GO_ORA_NEURAL.pdf", 10, 8)
}

# Heatmap of neural genes logFC (from ORA + GSEA)
if ((nrow(neural_ora) > 0) | (nrow(neural_gsea) > 0)) {
  neural_gene_vec <- unique(unlist(strsplit(
    c(neural_ora$Genes, if ("core_enrichment" %in% names(neural_gsea)) neural_gsea$core_enrichment else NULL), "/")))
  neural_gene_tbl <- tbl %>% dplyr::filter(ENTREZID %in% neural_gene_vec)
  if (nrow(neural_gene_tbl) > 0) {
    mat <- matrix(neural_gene_tbl$logFC, nrow=1, dimnames=list(NULL, neural_gene_tbl$gene_label))
    col_fun <- circlize::colorRamp2(c(-max(abs(mat)),0,max(abs(mat))), c("royalblue","white","firebrick"))
    pdf(file.path(outdir,"heatmap_neural_gene_logFC.pdf"), 8, 2.5)
    ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap(mat, name="log2FC", col=col_fun, cluster_columns=TRUE,
                            show_row_names=FALSE, column_names_gp=grid::gpar(fontsize=7))
    dev.off()
  }
}

neural_summary <- data.frame(
  Set            = c("Neural ORA (BP)","Neural GSEA (BP)","Neural ORA (MF)","Neural GSEA (MF)"),
  N_terms        = c(nrow(neural_ora), nrow(neural_gsea), nrow(neural_ora_MF), nrow(neural_gsea_MF)),
  Top_BP_ORA     = c(if (nrow(neural_ora)>0) neural_ora$Description[1] else NA, NA, NA, NA),
  Top_BP_GSEA    = c(NA, if (nrow(neural_gsea)>0) neural_gsea$Description[1] else NA, NA, NA),
  Top_MF_ORA     = c(NA, NA, if (nrow(neural_ora_MF)>0) neural_ora_MF$Description[1] else NA, NA),
  Top_MF_GSEA    = c(NA, NA, NA, if (nrow(neural_gsea_MF)>0) neural_gsea_MF$Description[1] else NA)
)

write.xlsx(list(
  Neural_GO_BP_ORA   = neural_ora,
  Neural_GO_BP_GSEA  = neural_gsea,
  Neural_GO_MF_ORA   = neural_ora_MF,
  Neural_GO_MF_GSEA  = neural_gsea_MF,
  Neural_Summary     = neural_summary
), file = file.path(outdir,"enrichment_neural_only.xlsx"), overwrite = TRUE)


##############################################################################
## 12. Extra: logFC distribution panels                                      ##
##############################################################################
plot_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  tbl                  %>% dplyr::transmute(logFC, Category = "All mapped"),
  tbl_sig_base         %>% dplyr::transmute(logFC, Category = "Significant"),
  if (exists("neural_gene_tbl") && nrow(neural_gene_tbl)>0)
    neural_gene_tbl   %>% dplyr::transmute(logFC, Category = "Neural") else
    data.frame(logFC = numeric(0), Category = character(0))
)
plot_df$Category <- factor(plot_df$Category, levels=c("All mapped","Significant","Neural"))

p_lfc <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x=logFC)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y=..density..), bins=50, fill="grey75", colour="black") +
  geom_density(colour="navy", linewidth=0.9, alpha=0.6) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  facet_wrap(~ Category, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(title="Distribution of log2 fold changes", x="log2 fold change", y="Density") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust=0.5))
save_plot(p_lfc, "logFC_distribution_panels.pdf", 7, 9)

##############################################################################
## 13. Save R objects + session info                                         ##
##############################################################################
saveRDS(list(ego=ego, ekegg=ekegg, ereact=ereact, gsea_go=gsea_go,
             gsea_go_MF=gsea_go_MF, gsea_kegg=gsea_kegg, fc_vec=fc_vec),
        file.path(outdir,"enrichment_objects.rds"))
writeLines(capture.output(sessionInfo()), file.path(outdir,"sessionInfo.txt"))

cat("\n✓ All done! See 'output/' for tables, figures, SVGs, and widgets.\n")


```
